exercises.code:
# dual skeptic-H1 · S26-T2-B-E1
store={}  # create-once store

def put(k,v):
    if k not in store:
        store[k] = v

put('r','v1'); put('r','v2')
print(store.get('r'))
# skeptic_check: form+pass contract
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic H1 S26/S26-T2-B-E1: contrasté el Pass del paquete («Write idempotente create-once: implementa put(k,v) que solo escribe si k no está en store.
